summary: Audio analysis feature testing completed. Backend: 6/6 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 6 tabs visible and functional, new Analyze tab working with Upload File and Listen Live buttons, Tips section displays correctly. All existing features verified working.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.' - Raw text not wrapped in Text component (EXISTING ISSUE from iteration 1)
Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' - Should update to use style prop (EXISTING ISSUE from iteration 1)

critical_code_review_comments: Audio analysis endpoints: ✓ Both /api/audio/analyze and /api/audio/analyze-recording working correctly
Librosa integration: ✓ BPM detection working (129.2 BPM detected with 99% confidence)
Key detection: ✓ Musical key detection working (E minor / 9A detected with 86% confidence)
Camelot mapping: ✓ Correct mapping from musical keys to Camelot codes
File validation: ✓ Unsupported formats rejected with 400 error
Recording validation: ✓ Recordings under 5 seconds rejected with appropriate error message
Empty file handling: ✓ Empty files rejected properly
Response fields: ✓ All required fields present (estimated_bpm, bpm_confidence, suggested_key, camelot_code, key_confidence, duration_seconds, beat_count, analysis_notes, source)
MongoDB _id exclusion: ✓ No _id in API responses
Frontend testID attributes: ✓ Upload and mic buttons have proper testID attributes
6 tabs visible: ✓ All tabs (BPM, Keys, Sets, AI Mix, Analyze, Practice) visible in tab bar
Analyze tab routing: ✓ Accessible at /analyze route
Tips section: ✓ Displays when no analysis result present
Psytrance reference: ✓ Still present in BPM tab (140-150 range)
Existing features: ✓ All previous features still functional

success_rate.frontend: 100% (All 6 tabs functional, Analyze tab working, Upload/Listen buttons present, Tips visible)

new_features_tested.analyze_tab: ✓ New Analyze tab loads at /analyze with proper header 'Audio Analyzer'
new_features_tested.upload_file_button: ✓ Upload File button present with testID='upload-file-btn', shows supported formats (MP3, FLAC, WAV, M4A, OGG)
new_features_tested.listen_live_button: ✓ Listen Live button present with testID='mic-record-btn', shows 'Record what's playing' description
new_features_tested.tips_section: ✓ Tips for Best Results section displays with 3 tips when no analysis result
new_features_tested.audio_analyze_endpoint: ✓ POST /api/audio/analyze accepts audio files, returns BPM (129.2) + key (E minor/9A) with confidence scores
new_features_tested.audio_analyze_recording_endpoint: ✓ POST /api/audio/analyze-recording accepts recordings, returns same fields with source='microphone'
new_features_tested.bpm_detection: ✓ Librosa BPM detection working (99% confidence on test file)
new_features_tested.key_detection: ✓ Krumhansl-Schmuckler key detection working (86% confidence on test file)
new_features_tested.camelot_mapping: ✓ Musical keys correctly mapped to Camelot codes (E minor → 9A)
new_features_tested.file_validation: ✓ Unsupported formats rejected, empty files rejected, recordings under 5s rejected
new_features_tested.six_tabs_visible: ✓ All 6 tabs visible in tab bar: BPM, Keys, Sets, AI Mix, Analyze, Practice

existing_features_verified.bpm_tab: ✓ BPM detector loads, Psytrance reference present (140-150)

audio_analysis_test_results.analysis_notes: File analysis includes filename, duration, sample rate, BPM, key, Camelot code, and beat count

context_for_next_testing_agent: NEW audio analysis feature fully functional. Both file upload and microphone recording endpoints working correctly with librosa-powered BPM and key detection. All 6 tabs now visible and functional. No new issues introduced. Existing low-priority warnings from iteration 1 still present (text node warning in AI Mix, deprecated pointerEvents prop).

performance_notes.supported_formats: MP3, WAV, M4A, AAC, OGG, FLAC
